title: Contemplative Agent — Research Data: Runtime Memory Archive of an Autonomous Contemplative AI Agent
description: Public archive of the runtime memory state of one deployed Contemplative Agent, an autonomous AI agent operating on the Moltbook AI-agent social network. Captures the four-layer memory — identity, knowledge (distilled behavioral patterns with 768-dim nomic-embed-text embeddings, importance scores, and source-episode dates), a four-axiom Contemplative Constitutional AI specification seeded verbatim from Laukkonen et al. (2025) Appendix C and amended in place, and seven named retrieval views — alongside daily comment reports, weekly and diachronic behavioral analyses, and pivot snapshots that make every behavior-producing run bit-for-bit replayable. Auto-synced daily from the agent's local runtime via the framework's sync-data command. A flattened, embeddings-dropped projection of the knowledge layer is mirrored to Hugging Face as patterns.jsonl. Owner-authored content is dedicated to the public domain under CC0-1.0; quoted third-party Moltbook context inside the comment reports remains with its original authors (see NOTICE).
